name: mtb3create
description: Create all ModusToolbox examples for BSPs

scripts.pkg:win: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output ../bin/win11/mtb3create.exe
scripts.pkg:mac: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-macos-x64 --output ../bin/macos/mtb3create
scripts.pkg:linux: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-linux-x64 --output ../bin/linux/mtb3create
scripts.pkg:all: npm run pkg:win && npm run pkg:mac && npm run pkg:linux
